action.reasoning: Observation: initial end-to-end run failed after ~23 minutes with std::bad_alloc before eval. Analysis: most likely CPU RAM/shared-memory pressure from PyG DataLoader workers holding a huge in-memory torch.load dictionary, possibly amplified by multiprocessing and large batches. Decision: make the pipeline memory-safe by forcing num_workers=0 by default, lowering batch sizes/model size for a quick baseline, adding checkpoint saving even if validation is costly, and retrying 2 epochs with immediate eval.
